scenario: Happy path — spec and design exist, entities exist, implementation, E2E tests, and coverage evaluation all pass on the first attempt.
preconditions: Scratch Next.js project with docs/requirements.md and docs/entity_model.md present (Prerequisites)
Project Readiness Gate items all pass (middleware, env files, Prisma schema/migrations present)
Target project's CLAUDE.md contains the Nexa Rules Gate marker <!-- NEXA_RULES_CONFIGURED -->
Current git branch is sprint-1 (or any sprint-* branch) to satisfy the Sprint Branch Gate
docs/use_cases/UC-TEST.md exists with Status: Ready, referencing only entities already present in docs/entity_model.md and prisma/schema.prisma
docs/delivery/ directory has no pre-existing UC-TEST-iterations.md
expected_steps: Rollback Checkpoint records current commit via git rev-parse HEAD
Entity Gate passes — every entity referenced in UC-TEST.md found in entity_model.md and schema.prisma
Step 1: both docs/use_cases/UC-TEST.md and docs/designs/UC-TEST-design.html confirmed present
Step 2: implement/SKILL.md runs; npx next build succeeds; npx vitest run passes; DoD check finds no outstanding Critical items

Step 2 Code Review Gate: code-review subagent spawned (subagent_type: code-review), reviews git diff <rollback-checkpoint-hash> against docs/use_cases/UC-TEST.md, returns no Critical findings on iteration 1 — gate passes without a re-review cycle
implement/SKILL.md's Post-Implementation Tracking is held back until the Code Review Gate passes, then runs to completion
Step 3 Phase 1: playwright-test subagent spawned (subagent_type: playwright-test) and writes E2E tests
Step 3 Phase 2: main context independently runs npx playwright test with no filters — 0 failed, 0 skipped, exit code 0, test count matches the subagent's report
Step 4 Phase 1: evaluate subagent spawned (subagent_type: evaluate) returns PASS coverage verdict with no Missing items and no Partial on critical items
Spec Status in docs/use_cases/UC-TEST.md updated from Implemented to Done
docs/delivery/UC-TEST-traceability.md generated mapping FRs/BRs to test file lines
GitHub issue search performed and, if a UC-TEST issue exists, a comment posted with the pipeline summary
expected_terminal_outcome: Pipeline Complete: UC-TEST summary table shows Artifact Check/Entity Gate/Implementation/E2E Tests all passing, Code Review at 1/2, and Coverage Evaluation at 1/2 (or better); docs/use_cases/UC-TEST.md Status = Done; no Failure Recovery block is shown.
pass_criteria: Every listed step occurs in order with no step skipped or reordered; no gate is bypassed, including the Code Review Gate between Step 2's DoD check and Step 3; the fix loops in the Code Review Gate, Step 3, and Step 4 are never entered (each passes on iteration 1); Post-Implementation Tracking does not run before the Code Review Gate passes; the terminal summary table is present, accurate, and Status is Done.
